0.response: {"Q0":"I didn't really use any specific strategy. I just memorized the sequence that I would need for both the red and blue planets and muscle memory kicked in."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I was mainly looking at the bar as it gives the possible chance percentage of winning the lottery."}

9.response: {"Q0":"No, everything in the instructions were clear."}

1.response: {"Q0":"I didn't really change the strategy I used as I only adjusted once the astronaut left the blue planet."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I think there was probably only a 40% chance of finding gems when there gems were covered in green ice."}

6.response: {"Q0":"I only collected the gems for the remaining planet where gems would matter."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I think my focus was the same for both tasks. It did go up once the mixed tasks occurred because I thought it needed my focus more."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes, as it specified what planet it was leaving from before actually doing it."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I thought the study was enjoyable and interesting because of how challenging it could get sometimes, but it took me longer than I expected it to."}
